page.title: List of Shikinaisha in Iki Island

revision.comment: 各国の式内社表の掲載。ただし、式内比定社は現在名神大社のみの状態、国史見在社・式外社も未掲載の状態。
revision.text:
'''壱岐国の式内社一覧'''（いきのくにのしきないしゃいちらん）は、『[[延喜式]]』第9巻・第10巻「神名帳上下」（[[延喜式神名帳]]）に記載のある[[神社]]、いわゆる「[[式内社]]」およびその[[論社]]のうち、[[壱岐国]]（壱岐島）に分類されている神社の一覧。 また[[式外社]]として、当時すでに当国に存在したはずであるのに『延喜式神名帳』に記載の無い神社についても付記する。 == 式内社 == 『延喜式神名帳』には、大社7座7社（うち名神大社6座6社）・小社17座17社の計24座24社が記載。 {{注|（凡例）
1）「神名帳」列は、[http://kindai.ndl.go.jp/info:ndljp/pid/1442211 『延喜式 上巻』]（大岡山書店、昭和4年、近代デジタルライブラリー）等における『[[延喜式神名帳]]』の記載を基に作成。社名表記は[http://21coe.kokugakuin.ac.jp/db/jinja/jinjaindex.html 神社史料集成]における字体（異体字がある場合には新字体・通用性の高い字体を使用）を基準とした。読みの「-」部分は、「神社」以外で仮名が振られていない部分。「○座」は座数を表し、一座の場合は記載していない。
2）格の「名神大」は[[名神大社]]を、「大」は式内大社（名神大社除く）を、「小」は式内小社を意味する。付記は社名とともに記されているもので、その主要なものについては「[[式内社#式内社の社格]]」を参照。
3）比定社が複数ある場合、最も有力なものを無冠で示し、他の論社には「（論）」を冠した。
4）本来の式内社とは認めがたいものの、式内社を合祀したなど、その後継を主張するもの、その他参考の神社には「（参）」を冠した。}} {| class="wikitable" style="background:#ffffff; white-space:nowrap" align="left" !align="center" style="background:#a0f0a0" colspan=4 | 神名帳 !align="center" style="background:#a0f0a0" colspan=3 | 比定社 !align="center" style="background:#a0f0a0" rowspan=2 | 集成 |- !align="center" style="background:#a0f0a0" | 社名 !align="center" style="background:#a0f0a0" | 読み !align="center" style="background:#a0f0a0" | 格 !align="center" style="background:#a0f0a0" | 付記 !align="center" style="background:#a0f0a0" | 社名 !align="center" style="background:#a0f0a0" | 所在地 !align="center" style="background:#a0f0a0" | 備考 |- |colspan=8 style="background-color:#ccffcc;"|'''[[壱岐郡|壱伎郡]]''' 12座（大4座・小8座） |- |'''水神社'''||ミツノ||小|||||||||| |- |'''阿多弥神社'''||アタミノ||小|||||||||| |- |'''住吉神社'''||スミヨシノ||名神大||||[[住吉神社 (壱岐市)|住吉神社]]||[[長崎県]][[壱岐市]]芦辺町住吉||||[http://21coe.kokugakuin.ac.jp/db/jinja/670102.html] |- |'''兵主神社'''||||名神大||||[[八幡神社 (壱岐市勝本町本宮西触)|八幡神社]]

（参）[[月讀神社 (壱岐市)|月讀神社]]||style="white-space:nowrap"|長崎県壱岐市芦辺町箱崎釘ノ尾触
長崎県壱岐市芦辺町国分東触||||[http://21coe.kokugakuin.ac.jp/db/jinja/670104.html] |- |'''国片主神社'''||クニカタヌシノ||小|||||||||| |- |'''高御祖神社'''||タカミオヤノ||小|||||||||| |- |'''手長比売神社'''||テナカヒメノ||小|||||||||| |- |'''佐肆布都神社'''||サシフツノ||小|||||||||| |- |'''同佐肆布都神社'''||||小|||||||||| |- |'''中津神社'''||||名神大||||[[聖母宮]]

長崎県壱岐市勝本町新城北触||||[http://21coe.kokugakuin.ac.jp/db/jinja/676001.html] |- |'''角上神社'''||ツノヘノ
ツノカミ||小|||||||||| |- |colspan=8 style="background-color:#ccffcc;"|'''[[石田郡]]''' 12座（大3座・小9座） |- |'''天手長男神社'''||-タナカヲノ||名神大||||[[興神社]]
（参）[[天手長男神社]]||長崎県壱岐市芦辺町湯岳興触
長崎県壱岐市郷ノ浦町田中触||||[http://21coe.kokugakuin.ac.jp/db/jinja/676002.html] |- |'''天手長比売神社'''||-タナカヒメノ||名神大||||（参）天手長男神社||長崎県壱岐市郷ノ浦町田中触||||[http://21coe.kokugakuin.ac.jp/db/jinja/676003.html] |- |'''弥佐支刀神社'''||ミサキトノ||小|||||||||| |- |'''国津神社'''||クニツカミ||小|||||||||| |- |'''海神社'''||アマノ
ワタツミノ||大||||||||||[http://21coe.kokugakuin.ac.jp/db/jinja/670101.html] |- |'''津神社'''||ツノ||小|||||||||| |- |'''与神社'''||ヨノ||小|||||||||| |- |'''大国玉神社'''||-クタマノ
-クニタマノ||小|||||||||| |- |'''尓自神社'''||ニジノ||小|||||||||| |- |'''見上神社'''||ミノヘノ
ミカミ||小|||||||||| |- |'''国津意加美神社'''||クツオカミノ||小|||||||||| |- |'''物部布都神社'''||モノノヘノ-||小|||||||||| |} {{-}} {{節stub}} == 式外社 == 当時すでに存在したはずであるのに『延喜式神名帳』に記載の無い神社。 === 国史見在社 === [[六国史]]に記載のある式外社。 {{節stub}} === その他 === 国史見在社以外の式外社。 {{節stub}} == 参考文献 == * 皇典講究所・全国神職会校訂[http://kindai.ndl.go.jp/info:ndljp/pid/1442211 『延喜式 上巻』]（大岡山書店、昭和4年） - 近代デジタルライブラリー * [http://kindai.ndl.go.jp/info:ndljp/pid/1273537 『延喜式 第2』]（日本古典全集刊行会、昭和4年） - 近代デジタルライブラリー == 外部リンク == * [http://21coe.kokugakuin.ac.jp/db/jinja/jinjastate67.html 壱岐国 式内社24座]（國學院大學21世紀COEプログラム「神道・神社史料集成」） {{式内社一覧}} [[Category:壱岐国の式内社|*]]

'''壱岐国の式内社一覧'''（いきのくにのしきないしゃいちらん）は、『[[延喜式]]』第9巻・第10巻「神名帳上下」（[[延喜式神名帳]]）に記載のある[[神社]]、いわゆる「[[式内社]]」およびその[[論社]]のうち、[[壱岐国]]（壱岐島）に分類されている神社の一覧。 また[[式外社]]として、当時すでに当国に存在したはずであるのに『延喜式神名帳』に記載の無い神社についても付記する。 == 式内社 == 『延喜式神名帳』には、大社7座7社（うち名神大社6座6社）・小社17座17社の計24座24社が記載。 {{注|（凡例）
1）「神名帳」列は、[http://kindai.ndl.go.jp/info:ndljp/pid/1442211 『延喜式 上巻』]（大岡山書店、昭和4年、近代デジタルライブラリー）等における『[[延喜式神名帳]]』の記載を基に作成。社名表記は[http://21coe.kokugakuin.ac.jp/db/jinja/jinjaindex.html 神社史料集成]（5を参照）における字体（異体字がある場合には新字体・通用性の高い字体を使用）を基準とした。読みの「-」部分は、「神社」以外で仮名が振られていない部分。「○座」は座数を表し、一座の場合は記載していない。
2）格の「名神大」は[[名神大社]]を、「大」は式内大社（名神大社除く）を、「小」は式内小社を意味する。付記は社名とともに記されているもので、その主要なものについては「[[式内社#式内社の社格]]」を参照。
3）比定社が複数ある場合、最も有力なものを無冠で示し、他の論社には「（論）」を冠した。
4）本来の式内社とは認めがたいものの、式内社を合祀したなど、その後継を主張するもの、その他参考の神社には「（参）」を冠した。
5）「集成」列は[http://21coe.kokugakuin.ac.jp/db/jinja/jinjaindex.html 神社史料集成]（國學院大學21世紀COEプログラム「神道・神社史料集成」）における神社項へのリンク先を記載。}} {| class="wikitable" style="background:#ffffff; white-space:nowrap" align="left" !align="center" style="background:#a0f0a0" colspan=4 | 神名帳 !align="center" style="background:#a0f0a0" colspan=3 | 比定社 !align="center" style="background:#a0f0a0" rowspan=2 | 集成 |- !align="center" style="background:#a0f0a0" | 社名 !align="center" style="background:#a0f0a0" | 読み !align="center" style="background:#a0f0a0" | 格 !align="center" style="background:#a0f0a0" | 付記 !align="center" style="background:#a0f0a0" | 社名 !align="center" style="background:#a0f0a0" | 所在地 !align="center" style="background:#a0f0a0" | 備考 |- |colspan=8 style="background-color:#ccffcc;"|'''[[壱岐郡|壱伎郡]]''' 12座（大4座・小8座） |- |'''水神社'''||ミツノ||小|||||||||| |- |'''阿多弥神社'''||アタミノ||小|||||||||| |- |'''住吉神社'''||スミヨシノ||名神大||||[[住吉神社 (壱岐市)|住吉神社]]||[[長崎県]][[壱岐市]]芦辺町住吉||||[http://21coe.kokugakuin.ac.jp/db/jinja/670102.html] |- |'''兵主神社'''||||名神大||||[[八幡神社 (壱岐市勝本町本宮西触)|八幡神社]]

ワタツミノ||大||||||||||[http://21coe.kokugakuin.ac.jp/db/jinja/670101.html] |- |'''津神社'''||ツノ||小|||||||||| |- |'''与神社'''||ヨノ||小|||||||||| |- |'''大国玉神社'''||-クタマノ
-クニタマノ||小|||||||||| |- |'''尓自神社'''||ニジノ||小|||||||||| |- |'''見上神社'''||ミノヘノ
ミカミ||小|||||||||| |- |'''国津意加美神社'''||クツオカミノ||小|||||||||| |- |'''物部布都神社'''||モノノヘノ-||小|||||||||| |} {{-}} {{節stub}} == 式外社 == 当時すでに存在したはずであるのに『延喜式神名帳』に記載の無い神社。 === 国史見在社 === [[六国史]]に記載のある式外社。 {{節stub}} === その他 === 国史見在社以外の式外社。 {{節stub}} == 参考文献 == * 皇典講究所・全国神職会校訂[http://kindai.ndl.go.jp/info:ndljp/pid/1442211 『延喜式 上巻』]（大岡山書店、昭和4年） - 近代デジタルライブラリー * [http://kindai.ndl.go.jp/info:ndljp/pid/1273537 『延喜式 第2』]（日本古典全集刊行会、昭和4年） - 近代デジタルライブラリー == 外部リンク == * [http://21coe.kokugakuin.ac.jp/db/jinja/jinjastate67.html 壱岐国 式内社24座]（國學院大學21世紀COEプログラム「神道・神社史料集成」） {{式内社一覧}} {{DEFAULTSORT:いきのくにのしきないしやいちらん}} [[Category:壱岐国の式内社|*]] [[Category:式内社の一覧]]

revision.comment: /* 式内社 */ [[プロジェクト‐ノート:神道#各郡記事の式内社の掲載について]]の議論に基づき、記載方法変更。
[[Special:Diff/56456974|WP:BOTREQ]] {{[[Template:NDLDC|NDLDC]]}} 導入
式内社一覧ページの体裁訂正：説明文見直し、凡例および表定義のテンプレート化、国会図書館リンクの修正。
改名提案告知。
/* 外部リンク */ ミス。
Saigen Jiro がページ「[[壱岐国の式内社一覧]]」を「[[壱岐島の式内社一覧]]」に移動しました: 適切な行政単位名による分類のため（[[ノート:対馬国の式内社一覧]]にて合意形成済）。
改名実施に伴う修正。
微修正。

revision.text:
'''壱岐島の式内社一覧'''（いきのしまのしきないしゃいちらん）は、『[[延喜式]]』第9巻・第10巻「神名帳上下」（[[延喜式神名帳]]）に記載のある[[神社]]、いわゆる「[[式内社]]」およびその[[論社]]のうち、[[壱岐国|壱岐島（壱岐国）]]に分類されている神社の一覧。
また『延喜式』神名帳の編纂当時に存在したが同帳に記載の無い神社、いわゆる「[[式外社]]」についても付記する。
== 式内社 == {{節stub}} 『延喜式』神名帳では、大社7座7社（うち名神大社6座6社）・小社17座17社の計24座24社を記載。
{{式内社一覧/凡例}} {{式内社一覧/header}} {{壱岐島壱伎郡の式内社一覧}} {{壱岐島石田郡の式内社一覧}} {{式内社一覧/footer}}
== 式外社 == {{節stub}} 『延喜式』神名帳の編纂当時に存在したが、同帳に記載の無い神社。
== 参考文献 == * 皇典講究所・全国神職会校訂[{{NDLDC|1442211/160}} 『延喜式 上巻』]（大岡山書店、昭和4年） - 国立国会図書館デジタルコレクション * [{{NDLDC|1273537/37}} 『延喜式 第2』]（日本古典全集刊行会、昭和4年） - 国立国会図書館デジタルコレクション
== 外部リンク == * [http://21coe.kokugakuin.ac.jp/db/jinja/jinjastate67.html 壱岐島 式内社24座] - 國學院大學21世紀COEプログラム「神道・神社史料集成」
{{式内社一覧}}

'''壱岐島の式内社一覧'''（いきのしまのしきないしゃいちらん）は、『[[Engishiki]]』第9巻・第10巻「神名帳上下」（[[延喜式神名帳]]）に記載のある[[神社]]、いわゆる「[[式内社]]」およびその[[論社]]のうち、[[壱岐国|壱岐島（壱岐国）]]に分類されている神社の一覧。
また『延喜式』神名帳の編纂当時に存在したが同帳に記載の無い神社、いわゆる「[[式外社]]」についても付記する。
== 式内社 == {{節stub}} 『延喜式』神名帳では、大社7座7社（うちMyojin Taisha社6座6社）・小社17座17社の計24座24社を記載。

revision.comment: Text replacement - "式内社一覧/凡例" to "List of Shikinai Shrines/Legend"
revision.text:
'''壱岐島の式内社一覧'''（いきのしまのしきないしゃいちらん）は、『[[Engishiki]]』第9巻・第10巻「神名帳上下」（[[延喜式神名帳]]）に記載のある[[神社]]、いわゆる「[[式内社]]」およびその[[論社]]のうち、[[壱岐国|壱岐島（壱岐国）]]に分類されている神社の一覧。
また『延喜式』神名帳の編纂当時に存在したが同帳に記載の無い神社、いわゆる「[[式外社]]」についても付記する。
== 式内社 == {{節stub}} 『延喜式』神名帳では、大社7座7社（うちMyojin Taisha社6座6社）・小社17座17社の計24座24社を記載。

== 式外社 == {{節stub}} 『延喜式』神名帳の編纂当時に存在したが、同帳に記載の無い神社。

'''壱岐島の式内社一覧'''（いきのしまのしきないしゃいちらん）は、『[[Engishiki]]』第9巻・第10巻「神名帳上下」（[[延喜式神名帳]]）に記載のある[[神社]]、いわゆる「[[式内社]]」およびその[[論社]]のうち、[[壱岐国|壱岐島（壱岐国）]]に分類されている神社の一覧。
また『延喜式』神名帳の編纂当時に存在したが同帳に記載の無い神社、いわゆる「[[式外社]]」についても付記する。
== 式内社 == {{節stub}} 『延喜式』神名帳では、大社7座7社（うちMyojin Taisha社6座6社）・小社17座17社の計24座24社を記載。
{{List of Shikinai Shrines/Legend}} {| class="wikitable" style="background:#ffffff; font-size:85%" ! style="background:#a0f0a0" colspan=4 | {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳}} ! style="background:#a0f0a0" colspan=3 | Designated Shrines ! style="background:#a0f0a0" rowspan=2 | Compilation |- style="white-space:nowrap;" ! style="background:#a0f0a0; padding-right:2.6em; padding-left:2.6em;" | Shrine Name ! style="background:#a0f0a0; padding-right:2.1em; padding-left:2.1em;" | Reading ! style="background:#a0f0a0; padding-right:2.1em; padding-left:2.1em;" | Rank ! style="background:#a0f0a0;" | Note ! style="background:#a0f0a0; padding-right:2.6em; padding-left:2.6em;" | Shrine Name ! style="background:#a0f0a0; padding-right:2.1em; padding-left:2.1em;" | Location ! style="background:#a0f0a0; padding-right:2.3em; padding-left:2.3em;" | Remarks |- {{壱岐島壱伎郡の式内社一覧}} {{壱岐島石田郡の式内社一覧}} |style="text-align:right; font-size:85%" colspan="8"|[[{{transclude|List of Shikinai Shrines/Legend}}|凡例を表示]] |}
== 式外社 == {{節stub}} 『延喜式』神名帳の編纂当時に存在したが、同帳に記載の無い神社。
== 参考文献 == * 皇典講究所・全国神職会校訂[{{NDLDC|1442211/160}} 『延喜式 上巻』]（大岡山書店、昭和4年） - 国立国会図書館デジtarukorekushiョn * [{{NDLDC|1273537/37}} 『延喜式 第2』]（日本古典全集刊行会、昭和4年） - 国立国会図書館デジtarukorekushiョn
== 外部rinku == * [http://21coe.kokugakuin.ac.jp/db/jinja/jinjastate67.html 壱岐島 式内社24座] - 國學院大學21世紀COEプroグramu「神道・神社史料集成」

{{afc comment|1=page target for move is at List of Shikinaisha in Iki Island[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:49, 26 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=page target for move is at [[List of Shikinaisha in Iki Island]][[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:48, 26 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=page target for move is at List of Shikinaisha in Iki Island[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:48, 26 March 2025 (UTC)}} '''壱岐島の式内社一覧'''（いきのしまのしきないしゃいちらん）は、『[[Engishiki]]』第9巻・第10巻「神名帳上下」（[[延喜式神名帳]]）に記載のある[[神社]]、いわゆる「[[式内社]]」およびその[[論社]]のうち、[[壱岐国|壱岐島（壱岐国）]]に分類されている神社の一覧。
また『延喜式』神名帳の編纂当時に存在したが同帳に記載の無い神社、いわゆる「[[式外社]]」についても付記する。
== 式内社 == {{節stub}} 『延喜式』神名帳では、大社7座7社（うちMyojin Taisha社6座6社）・小社17座17社の計24座24社を記載。

{{afc comment|1=page target for move is at List of Shikinaisha in Iki Island[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:49, 26 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=page target for move is at [[List of Shikinaisha in Iki Island]][[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:48, 26 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=page target for move is at List of Shikinaisha in Iki Island[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:48, 26 March 2025 (UTC)}} '''壱岐島の式内社一覧'''（いきのしまのしきないしゃいちらん）は、『[[Engishiki]]』第9巻・第10巻「神名帳上下」（[[延喜式神名帳]]）に記載のある[[神社]]、いわゆる「[[式内社]]」およびその[[論社]]のうち、[[壱岐国|壱岐島（壱岐国）]]に分類されている神社の一覧。

{{afc comment|1=page target for move is at List of Shikinaisha in Iki Island[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:49, 26 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=page target for move is at [[List of Shikinaisha in Iki Island]][[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:48, 26 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=page target for move is at List of Shikinaisha in Iki Island[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:48, 26 March 2025 (UTC)}} '''壱岐島の式内社一覧'''（いきのしまのしきないしゃいちらん）は、『[[Engishiki]]』第9巻・第10巻「神名帳上下」（[[延喜式神名帳]]）に記載のある[[神社]]、いわゆる「[[式内社]]」およびその[[論社]]のうち、[[壱岐国|壱岐島（壱岐国）]]に分類されている神社の一覧。
また『延喜式』神名帳の編纂当時に存在したが同帳に記載の無い神社、いわゆる「[[式外社]]」についても付記する。
== 式内社 == {{節stub}} 『延喜式』神名帳では、大社7座7社（うちMyojin Taisha社6座6社）・小社17座17社の計24座24社を記載。
{{List of Shikinai Shrines/Legend}} {| class="wikitable" style="background:#ffffff; font-size:85%" ! style="background:#a0f0a0" colspan=4 | {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳}} ! style="background:#a0f0a0" colspan=3 | Designated Shrines ! style="background:#a0f0a0" rowspan=2 | Compilation |- style="white-space:nowrap;" ! style="background:#a0f0a0; padding-right:2.6em; padding-left:2.6em;" | Shrine Name ! style="background:#a0f0a0; padding-right:2.1em; padding-left:2.1em;" | Reading ! style="background:#a0f0a0; padding-right:2.1em; padding-left:2.1em;" | Rank ! style="background:#a0f0a0;" | Note ! style="background:#a0f0a0; padding-right:2.6em; padding-left:2.6em;" | Shrine Name ! style="background:#a0f0a0; padding-right:2.1em; padding-left:2.1em;" | Location ! style="background:#a0f0a0; padding-right:2.3em; padding-left:2.3em;" | Remarks |- {{壱岐島壱伎郡の式内社一覧}} {{壱岐島石田郡の式内社一覧}} |style="text-align:right; font-size:85%" colspan="8"|[[{{transclude|List of Shikinai Shrines/Legend}}|凡例を表示]] |}
== 式外社 == {{節stub}} 『延喜式』神名帳の編纂当時に存在したが、同帳に記載の無い神社。

{{afc comment|1=page target for move is at List of Shikinaisha in Iki Island[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:49, 26 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=page target for move is at [[List of Shikinaisha in Iki Island]][[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:48, 26 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=page target for move is at List of Shikinaisha in Iki Island[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:48, 26 March 2025 (UTC)}} '''壱岐島の式内社一覧'''（いきのしまのしきないしゃいちらん）は、『[[Engishiki]]』第9巻・第10巻「神名帳上下」（[[延喜式神名帳]]）に記載のある[[神社]]、いわゆる「[[式内社]]」およびその[[論社]]のうち、[[壱岐国|壱岐島（壱岐国）]]に分類されている神社の一覧。 また『延喜式』神名帳の編纂当時に存在したが同帳に記載の無い神社、いわゆる「[[式外社]]」についても付記する。 == 式内社 == {{節stub}} 『延喜式』神名帳では、大社7座7社（うちMyojin Taisha社6座6社）・小社17座17社の計24座24社を記載。 {{List of Shikinai Shrines/Legend}} {| class="wikitable" style="background:#ffffff; font-size:85%" ! font-size:85%" colspan="8"|[[{{transclude|List of Shikinai Shrines/Legend}}|凡例を表示]] |} == 式外社 == {{節stub}} 『延喜式』神名帳の編纂当時に存在したが、同帳に記載の無い神社。 == 参考文献 == * 皇典講究所・全国神職会校訂[{{NDLDC|1442211/160}} 『延喜式 上巻』]（大岡山書店、昭和4th year ） - 国立国会図書館デジtarukorekushiョn * [{{NDLDC|1273537/37}} 『延喜式 第2』]（日本古典全集刊行会、昭和4th year ） - 国立国会図書館デジtarukorekushiョn == 外部rinku == * [http://21coe.kokugakuin.ac.jp/db/jinja/jinjastate67.html 壱岐島 式内社24座] - 國學院大學21世紀COEプroグramu「神道・神社史料集成」 {{式内社一覧}} {{citation needed|いきのしまのしきないしやいちらん}} {{citation needed|壱岐島のList of Shikinai Shrines}} {{citation needed|壱岐島のList of Shikinai Shrines}}{{citation needed|壱岐島のList of Shikinai Shrines}}{{citation needed|壱岐島のList of Shikinai Shrines}} {{citation needed|List of Shikinaisha in Iki Island}} {{citation needed|List of Shikinaisha in Iki Island}} {{citation needed|List of Shikinaisha in List of Shikinaisha in Iki Island}} {{citation needed|List of Shikinaisha in List of Shikinaisha in Iki Island}} {{citation needed|List of Shikinaisha in Iki Island}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Fixed imported list of Shikinaisha and templates]] [[Category:11]] [[Category:erroneous transclusions of Template:壱岐島壱伎郡の式内社一覧]] [[Category:qq]] [[Category:いき いき]] [[Category:Shikinai Shrine replacements]] [[Category:to be resorted]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:erroneous transclusions of Template:壱岐島石田郡の式内社一覧]] [[Category:いき いした]] [[Category:List of Shikinai Shrines]] }} [[sn:壱岐島壱伎郡のList of Shikinai Shrines]] [[ja:Template:壱岐島壱伎郡の式内社一覧]] [[sn:壱岐島壱伎郡の式内社一覧]] [[sn:壱岐島石田郡のList of Shikinai Shrines]] [[ja:Template:壱岐島石田郡の式内社一覧]] [[sn:壱岐島石田郡の式内社一覧]] [[ja:壱岐島の式内社一覧]] [[sn:壱岐島の式内社一覧]] [[sn:壱岐島のList of Shikinai Shrines]] [[sn:List of Shikinaisha in Iki Island]] {{DEFAULTSORT:壱岐島壱伎郡のList of Shikinai Shrines}} {{DEFAULTSORT:壱岐島石田郡のList of Shikinai Shrines}} {{DEFAULTSORT:List of Shikinaisha in Iki Island}}

{{afc comment|1=page target for move is at List of Shikinaisha in Iki Island[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:49, 26 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=page target for move is at [[List of Shikinaisha in Iki Island]][[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:48, 26 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=page target for move is at List of Shikinaisha in Iki Island[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:48, 26 March 2025 (UTC)}} '''壱岐島の式内社一覧'''（いきのしまのしきないしゃいちらん）は、『[[Engishiki]]』第9巻・第10巻「神名帳上下」（[[延喜式神名帳]]）に記載のある[[神社]]、いわゆる「[[式内社]]」およびその[[論社]]のうち、[[壱岐国|壱岐島（壱岐国）]]に分類されている神社の一覧。 また『延喜式』神名帳の編纂当時に存在したが同帳に記載の無い神社、いわゆる「[[式外社]]」についても付記する。 == 式内社 == {{節stub}} 『延喜式』神名帳では、大社7座7社（うちMyojin Taisha社6座6社）・小社17座17社の計24座24社を記載。 {{List of Shikinai Shrines/Legend}} {| class="wikitable" style="background:#ffffff; font-size:85%" ! font-size:85%" colspan="8"|[[{{transclude|List of Shikinai Shrines/Legend}}|凡例を表示]] |} == 式外社 == {{節stub}} 『延喜式』神名帳の編纂当時に存在したが、同帳に記載の無い神社。 == 参考文献 == * 皇典講究所・全国神職会校訂[{{NDLDC|1442211/160}} 『延喜式 上巻』]（大岡山書店、昭和4th year ） - 国立国会図書館デジtarukorekushiョn * [{{NDLDC|1273537/37}} 『延喜式 第2』]（日本古典全集刊行会、昭和4th year ） - 国立国会図書館デジtarukorekushiョn == 外部rinku == * [http://21coe.kokugakuin.ac.jp/db/jinja/jinjastate67.html 壱岐島 式内社24座] - 國學院大學21世紀COEプroグramu「神道・神社史料集成」 {{式内社一覧}} {{citation needed|いきのしまのしきないしやいちらん}} {{citation needed|壱岐島のList of Shikinai Shrines}} {{citation needed|壱岐島のList of Shikinai Shrines}}{{citation needed|壱岐島のList of Shikinai Shrines}}{{citation needed|壱岐島のList of Shikinai Shrines}} {{citation needed|List of Shikinaisha in Iki Island}} {{citation needed|List of Shikinaisha in Iki Island}} {{citation needed|List of Shikinaisha in List of Shikinaisha in Iki Island}} {{citation needed|List of Shikinaisha in List of Shikinaisha in Iki Island}} {{citation needed|List of Shikinaisha in Iki Island}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Fixed imported list of Shikinaisha and templates]] [[Category:11]] [[Category:erroneous transclusions of Template:壱岐島壱伎郡の式内社一覧]] [[Category:qq]] [[Category:いき いき]] [[Category:Shikinai Shrine replacements]] [[Category:to be resorted]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:erroneous transclusions of Template:壱岐島石田郡の式内社一覧]] [[Category:いき いした]] [[Category:List of Shikinai Shrines]] }} [[sn:壱岐島壱伎郡のList of Shikinai Shrines]] [[ja:Template:壱岐島壱伎郡の式内社一覧]] [[sn:壱岐島壱伎郡の式内社一覧]] [[sn:壱岐島石田郡のList of Shikinai Shrines]] [[ja:Template:壱岐島石田郡の式内社一覧]] [[sn:壱岐島石田郡の式内社一覧]] [[ja:壱岐島の式内社一覧]] [[sn:壱岐島の式内社一覧]] [[sn:壱岐島のList of Shikinai Shrines]] [[sn:List of Shikinaisha in Iki Island]] {{DEFAULTSORT:壱岐島壱伎郡のList of Shikinai Shrines}} {{DEFAULTSORT:壱岐島石田郡のList of Shikinai Shrines}} {{DEFAULTSORT:List of Shikinaisha in Iki Island}}

revision.comment: Removing from [[Category:Shikinai Shrine replacements]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text:
{{afc comment|1=page target for move is at List of Shikinaisha in Iki Island[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:49, 26 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=page target for move is at [[List of Shikinaisha in Iki Island]][[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:48, 26 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=page target for move is at List of Shikinaisha in Iki Island[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:48, 26 March 2025 (UTC)}} '''壱岐島の式内社一覧'''（いきのしまのしきないしゃいちらん）は、『[[Engishiki]]』第9巻・第10巻「神名帳上下」（[[延喜式神名帳]]）に記載のある[[神社]]、いわゆる「[[式内社]]」およびその[[論社]]のうち、[[壱岐国|壱岐島（壱岐国）]]に分類されている神社の一覧。 また『延喜式』神名帳の編纂当時に存在したが同帳に記載の無い神社、いわゆる「[[式外社]]」についても付記する。 == 式内社 == {{節stub}} 『延喜式』神名帳では、大社7座7社（うちMyojin Taisha社6座6社）・小社17座17社の計24座24社を記載。 {{List of Shikinai Shrines/Legend}} {| class="wikitable" style="background:#ffffff; font-size:85%" ! {{afc comment|1=page target for move is at List of Shikinaisha in Iki Island[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:49, 26 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=page target for move is at [[List of Shikinaisha in Iki Island]][[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:48, 26 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=page target for move is at List of Shikinaisha in Iki Island[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:48, 26 March 2025 (UTC)}} '''壱岐島の式内社一覧'''（いきのしまのしきないしゃいちらん）は、『[[Engishiki]]』第9巻・第10巻「神名帳上下」（[[延喜式神名帳]]）に記載のある[[神社]]、いわゆる「[[式内社]]」およびその[[論社]]のうち、[[壱岐国|壱岐島（壱岐国）]]に分類されている神社の一覧。 また『延喜式』神名帳の編纂当時に存在したが同帳に記載の無い神社、いわゆる「[[式外社]]」についても付記する。 == 式内社 == {{節stub}} 『延喜式』神名帳では、大社7座7社（うちMyojin Taisha社6座6社）・小社17座17社の計24座24社を記載。 {{List of Shikinaisha/Legend}} {| class="wikitable" style="background:#ffffff; font-size:85%" ! font-size:85%" colspan="8"|[[{{transclude|List of Shikinaisha/Legend}}|凡例を表示]] |} == 式外社 == 『延喜式』神名帳の編纂当時に存在したが、同帳に記載の無い神社。 == 参考文献 == * 皇典講究所・全国神職会校訂[{{NDLDC|1442211/160}} 『延喜式 上巻』]（大岡山書店、昭和4th year ） - 国立国会図書館デジtarukorekushiョn * [{{NDLDC|1273537/37}} 『延喜式 第2』]（日本古典全集刊行会、昭和4th year ） - 国立国会図書館デジtarukorekushiョn == External links == * [http://21coe.kokugakuin.ac.jp/db/jinja/jinjastate67.html 壱岐島 式内社24座] - 國學院大學21世紀COEプroグramu「神道・神社史料集成」 {{式内社一覧}} {{citation needed|いきのしまのしきないしやいちらん}} {{citation needed|壱岐島のList of Shikinai Shrines}} {{citation needed|壱岐島のList of Shikinai Shrines}}{{citation needed|壱岐島のList of Shikinai Shrines}}{{citation needed|壱岐島のList of Shikinai Shrines}} {{citation needed|List of Shikinaisha in Iki Island}} {{citation needed|List of Shikinaisha in Iki Island}} {{citation needed|List of Shikinaisha in List of Shikinaisha in Iki Island}} {{citation needed|List of Shikinaisha in List of Shikinaisha in Iki Island}} {{citation needed|List of Shikinaisha in Iki Island}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Fixed imported list of Shikinaisha and templates]] [[Category:11]] [[Category:erroneous transclusions of Template:壱岐島壱伎郡の式内社一覧]] [[Category:qq]] [[Category:いき いき]] [[Category:Shikinai Shrine replacements]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:erroneous transclusions of Template:壱岐島石田郡の式内社一覧]] [[Category:いき いした]] [[Category:List of Shikinai Shrines]] }} [[sn:壱岐島壱伎郡のList of Shikinai Shrines]] [[ja:Template:壱岐島壱伎郡の式内社一覧]] [[sn:壱岐島壱伎郡の式内社一覧]] [[sn:壱岐島石田郡のList of Shikinai Shrines]] [[ja:Template:壱岐島石田郡の式内社一覧]] [[sn:壱岐島石田郡の式内社一覧]] [[ja:壱岐島の式内社一覧]] [[sn:壱岐島の式内社一覧]] [[sn:壱岐島のList of Shikinai Shrines]] [[sn:List of Shikinaisha in Iki Island]] {{DEFAULTSORT:壱岐島壱伎郡のList of Shikinai Shrines}} {{DEFAULTSORT:壱岐島石田郡のList of Shikinai Shrines}} {{DEFAULTSORT:List of Shikinaisha in Iki Island}}

revision.comment: Text replacement - "== Shikinai Shrines (式内社) ==『延喜式』神名帳では、大社" to "== Shikinai Shrines (式内社) == In the Engishiki, a list of Shinto shrines is given to large shrines."
revision.text:
{{afc comment|1=page target for move is at List of Shikinaisha in Iki Island[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:49, 26 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=page target for move is at [[List of Shikinaisha in Iki Island]][[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:48, 26 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=page target for move is at List of Shikinaisha in Iki Island[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:48, 26 March 2025 (UTC)}} '''壱岐島の式内社一覧'''（いきのしまのしきないしゃいちらん）は、『[[Engishiki]]』第9巻・第10巻「神名帳上下」（[[延喜式神名帳]]）に記載のある[[神社]]、いわゆる「[[式内社]]」およびその[[論社]]のうち、[[壱岐国|壱岐島（壱岐国）]]に分類されている神社の一覧。 また『延喜式』神名帳の編纂当時に存在したが同帳に記載の無い神社、いわゆる「[[式外社]]」についても付記する。 == Shikinai Shrines (式内社) == In the Engishiki, a list of Shinto shrines is given to large shrines.7座7社（うちMyojin Taisha社6座6社）・小社17座17社の計24座24社を記載。 {{List of Shikinaisha/Legend}} {| class="wikitable" style="background:#ffffff; font-size:85%" ! revision.comment: Removing from [[Category:Shikinai Shrine replacements]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text:
{{afc comment|1=page target for move is at List of Shikinaisha in Iki Island[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:49, 26 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=page target for move is at [[List of Shikinaisha in Iki Island]][[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:48, 26 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=page target for move is at List of Shikinaisha in Iki Island[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:48, 26 March 2025 (UTC)}} '''壱岐島の式内社一覧'''（いきのしまのしきないしゃいちらん）は、『[[Engishiki]]』第9巻・第10巻「神名帳上下」（[[延喜式神名帳]]）に記載のある[[神社]]、いわゆる「[[式内社]]」およびその[[論社]]のうち、[[壱岐国|壱岐島（壱岐国）]]に分類されている神社の一覧。 また『延喜式』神名帳の編纂当時に存在したが同帳に記載の無い神社、いわゆる「[[式外社]]」についても付記する。 == Shikinai Shrines (式内社) == In the Engishiki, a list of Shinto shrines is given to large shrines.7座7社（うちMyojin Taisha社6座6社）・小社17座17社の計24座24社を記載。 {{List of Shikinaisha/Legend}} {| class="wikitable" style="background:#ffffff; font-size:85%" ! {{afc comment|1=page target for move is at List of Shikinaisha in Iki Island[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:49, 26 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=page target for move is at [[List of Shikinaisha in Iki Island]][[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:48, 26 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=page target for move is at List of Shikinaisha in Iki Island[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:48, 26 March 2025 (UTC)}} '''壱岐島の式内社一覧'''（いきのしまのしきないしゃいちらん）は、『[[Engishiki]]』第9巻・第10巻「神名帳上下」（[[延喜式神名帳]]）に記載のある[[神社]]、いわゆる「[[式内社]]」およびその[[論社]]のうち、[[壱岐国|壱岐島（壱岐国）]]に分類されている神社の一覧。 また『延喜式』神名帳の編纂当時に存在したが同帳に記載の無い神社、いわゆる「[[式外社]]」についても付記する。 == Shikinai Shrines (式内社) == In the Engishiki, a list of Shinto shrines is given to large shrines.7座7社（うちMyojin Taisha社6座6社）・小社17座17社の計24座24社を記載。 {{List of Shikinaisha/Legend}} {| class="wikitable" style="background:#ffffff; font-size:85%" ! font-size:85%" colspan="8"|[[{{transclude|List of Shikinaisha/Legend}}|凡例を表示]] |} == 式外社 == 『延喜式』神名帳の編纂当時に存在したが、同帳に記載の無い神社。 == References == ===Notelist=== ===Reflist=== {{reflist}} * 皇典講究所・全国神職会校訂[{{NDLDC|1442211/160}} 『延喜式 上巻』]（大岡山書店、昭和4th year ） - 国立国会図書館デジtarukorekushiョn * [{{NDLDC|1273537/37}} 『延喜式 第2』]（日本古典全集刊行会、昭和4th year ） - 国立国会図書館デジtarukorekushiョn == External links == * [http://21coe.kokugakuin.ac.jp/db/jinja/jinjastate67.html 壱岐島 式内社24座] - 國學院大學21世紀COEプroグramu「神道・神社史料集成」 {{式内社一覧}} {{citation needed|いきのしまのしきないしやいちらん}} {{citation needed|壱岐島のList of Shikinai Shrines}} {{citation needed|壱岐島のList of Shikinai Shrines}}{{citation needed|壱岐島のList of Shikinai Shrines}}{{citation needed|壱岐島のList of Shikinai Shrines}} {{citation needed|List of Shikinaisha in Iki Island}} {{citation needed|List of Shikinaisha in Iki Island}} {{citation needed|List of Shikinaisha in List of Shikinaisha in Iki Island}} {{citation needed|List of Shikinaisha in List of Shikinaisha in Iki Island}} {{citation needed|List of Shikinaisha in Iki Island}} {{draft categories| }} {{draft categories| [[Category:pages to be translated]] [[Category:Fixed imported list of Shikinaisha and templates]] [[Category:11]] [[Category:erroneous transclusions of Template:壱岐島壱伎郡の式内社一覧]] [[Category:いき いき]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:erroneous transclusions of Template:壱岐島石田郡の式内社一覧]] [[Category:いき いした]] [[Category:Lists of Shikinaisha by location]] }} [[sn:壱岐島壱伎郡のList of Shikinai Shrines]] [[ja:Template:壱岐島壱伎郡の式内社一覧]] [[sn:壱岐島壱伎郡の式内社一覧]] [[sn:壱岐島石田郡のList of Shikinai Shrines]] [[ja:Template:壱岐島石田郡の式内社一覧]] [[sn:壱岐島石田郡の式内社一覧]] [[ja:壱岐島の式内社一覧]] [[sn:壱岐島の式内社一覧]] [[sn:壱岐島のList of Shikinai Shrines]] [[sn:List of Shikinaisha in Iki Island]] {{citation needed|壱岐島壱伎郡のList of Shikinai Shrines}} {{citation needed|壱岐島石田郡のList of Shikinai Shrines}} {{citation needed|List of Shikinaisha in Iki Island}}

revision.comment: Copying from [[Category:Pages without meta categories]] to [[Category:qq]][[sn:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:qq]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text:
{{afc comment|1=page target for move is at List of Shikinaisha in Iki Island[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:49, 26 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=page target for move is at [[List of Shikinaisha in Iki Island]][[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:48, 26 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=page target for move is at List of Shikinaisha in Iki Island[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:48, 26 March 2025 (UTC)}} '''壱岐島の式内社一覧'''（いきのしまのしきないしゃいちらん）は、『[[Engishiki]]』第9巻・第10巻「神名帳上下」（[[延喜式神名帳]]）に記載のある[[神社]]、いわゆる「[[式内社]]」およびその[[論社]]のうち、[[壱岐国|壱岐島（壱岐国）]]に分類されている神社の一覧。 また『延喜式』神名帳の編纂当時に存在したが同帳に記載の無い神社、いわゆる「[[式外社]]」についても付記する。 == Shikinai Shrines (式内社) == In the Engishiki, a list of Shinto shrines is given to large shrines.7座7社（うちMyojin Taisha社6座6社）・小社17座17社の計24座24社を記載。 {{List of Shikinaisha/Legend}} {| class="wikitable" style="background:#ffffff; font-size:85%" ! revision.text:
{{afc comment|1=page target for move is at List of Shikinaisha in Iki Island[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:49, 26 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=page target for move is at [[List of Shikinaisha in Iki Island]][[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:48, 26 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=page target for move is at List of Shikinaisha in Iki Island[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:48, 26 March 2025 (UTC)}} '''壱岐島の式内社一覧'''（いきのしまのしきないしゃいちらん）は、『[[Engishiki]]』第9巻・第10巻「神名帳上下」（[[延喜式神名帳]]）に記載のある[[神社]]、いわゆる「[[式内社]]」およびその[[論社]]のうち、[[壱岐国|壱岐島（壱岐国）]]に分類されている神社の一覧。 また『延喜式』神名帳の編纂当時に存在したが同帳に記載の無い神社、いわゆる「[[式外社]]」についても付記する。 == Shikinai Shrines (式内社) == In the Engishiki, a list of Shinto shrines is given to large shrines.7座7社（うちMyojin Taisha社6座6社）・小社17座17社の計24座24社を記載。 {{List of Shikinaisha/Legend}} {| class="wikitable" style="background:#ffffff; font-size:85%" ! revision.text:
This is a '''List of Shikinaisha in Iki Island'''. Or the list of shrines in LALALAList of Shikinaisha in Iki Island which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳|12=draft}}. [[Category:Lists of Shikinaisha by location]] == Shikinai Shrines (式内社) == In the Engishiki, a list of Shinto shrines is given to large shrines.7座7社（うちMyojin Taisha社6座6社）・小社17座17社の計24座24社を記載。 {{List of Shikinaisha/Legend}} {| class="wikitable" style="background:#ffffff; font-size:85%" ! This is a '''List of Shikinaisha in Iki Island'''. Or the list of shrines in Iki Island which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳|12=draft}}. revision.text:
This is a '''List of Shikinaisha in Iki Island'''. Or the list of shrines in Iki Island which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳|12=draft}}. On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha|12=draft|12=draft}} of LALALAList of Shikinaisha in Iki Island which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳|12=draft}}. [[Category:Lists of Shikinaisha by location]] == Shikinai Shrines (式内社) == In the Engishiki, a list of Shinto shrines is given to large shrines.7座7社（うちMyojin Taisha社6座6社）・小社17座17社の計24座24社を記載。 {{List of Shikinaisha/Legend}} {| class="wikitable" style="background:#ffffff; font-size:85%" ! revision.comment: Text replacement - "LALALAList of Shikinaisha in " to ""
revision.text:
This is a '''List of Shikinaisha in Iki Island'''. Or the list of shrines in Iki Island which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳|12=draft}}. On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha|12=draft|12=draft}} of Iki Island which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳|12=draft}}. [[Category:Lists of Shikinaisha by location]] == Shikinai Shrines (式内社) == In the Engishiki, a list of Shinto shrines is given to large shrines.7座7社（うちMyojin Taisha社6座6社）・小社17座17社の計24座24社を記載。 {{List of Shikinaisha/Legend}} {| class="wikitable" style="background:#ffffff; font-size:85%" ! style="background:#a0f0a0" colspan=4 | {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|12=draft}} ! [[category: Lists of Shikinaisha by location top]]This is a '''List of Shikinaisha in Iki Island'''. Or the list of shrines in Iki Island which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳|12=draft}}. On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha|12=draft|12=draft}} of Iki Island which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳|12=draft}}. revision.text:
This is a '''List of Shikinaisha in Iki Island'''. Or the list of shrines in Iki Island which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳|12=draft}}. On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha|12=draft|12=draft}} of Iki Island which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳|12=draft}}. [[Category:Lists of Shikinaisha by location]] == Shikinai Shrines (式内社) == In the Engishiki, a list of Shinto shrines is given to large shrines.7座7社（うちMyojin Taisha社6座6社）・小社17座17社の計24座24社を記載。 {{List of Shikinaisha/Legend}} {| class="wikitable" style="background:#ffffff; font-size:85%" ! revision.text:
This is a '''List of Shikinaisha in Iki Island'''. Or the list of shrines in Iki Island which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳|12=draft}}. On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha|12=draft|12=draft}} of Iki Island which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳|12=draft}}. [[Category:Lists of Shikinaisha by location]] == Shikinai Shrines (式内社) == In the Engishiki, a list of Shinto shrines is given to large shrines.7座7社（うちMyojin Taisha社6座6社）・小社17座17社の計24座24社を記載。 {{List of Shikinaisha/Legend}} {| class="wikitable" style="background:#ffffff; font-size:85%" ! [[Category:Shikinaisha top]]This is a '''List of Shikinaisha in Iki Island'''. Or the list of shrines in Iki Island which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳|12=draft}}. On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha|12=draft|12=draft}} of Iki Island which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳|12=draft}}. revision.comment: top bottom marking
revision.text:
[[Category:Shikinaisha top]][[Category:Shikinaisha top]]This is a '''List of Shikinaisha in Iki Island'''. Or the list of shrines in Iki Island which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳|12=draft}}. On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha|12=draft|12=draft}} of Iki Island which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳|12=draft}}. [[Category:Lists of Shikinaisha by location]] == Shikinai Shrines (式内社) == In the Engishiki, a list of Shinto shrines is given to large shrines.7座7社（うちMyojin Taisha社6座6社）・小社17座17社の計24座24社を記載。 {{List of Shikinaisha/Legend}} {| class="wikitable" style="background:#ffffff; font-size:85%" ! [[Category:Shikinaisha top]][[Category:Shikinaisha top]]This is a '''List of Shikinaisha in Iki Island'''. Or the list of shrines in Iki Island which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳|12=draft}}. On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha|12=draft|12=draft}} of Iki Island which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳|12=draft}}. [[Category:Shikinaisha top]][[Category:Shikinaisha top]]This is a '''List of Shikinaisha in Iki Island'''. Or the list of shrines in Iki Island which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳|12=draft}}. On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha|12=draft|12=draft}} of Iki Island which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳|12=draft}}. revision.text:
[[Category:Shikinaisha top]][[Category:Shikinaisha top]]This is a '''List of Shikinaisha in Iki Island'''. Or the list of shrines in [[Iki Island which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳|12=draft}}. On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha|12=draft|12=draft}} of Iki Island which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳|12=draft}}. [[Category:Lists of Shikinaisha by location]] == Shikinai Shrines (式内社) == In the Engishiki, a list of Shinto shrines is given to large shrines.7座7社（うちMyojin Taisha社6座6社）・小社17座17社の計24座24社を記載。 {{List of Shikinaisha/Legend}} {| class="wikitable" style="background:#ffffff; font-size:85%" ! [[Category:Shikinaisha top]][[Category:Shikinaisha top]]This is a '''List of Shikinaisha in Iki Island'''. Or the list of shrines in [[Iki Island]] which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳|12=draft}}. On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha|12=draft|12=draft}} of [[Iki Island which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳|12=draft}}. revision.text:
[[Category:Shikinaisha top]][[Category:Shikinaisha top]]This is a '''List of Shikinaisha in Iki Island'''. Or the list of shrines in [[Iki Island]] which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳|12=draft}}. On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha|12=draft|12=draft}} of [[Iki Island]] which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳|12=draft}}. [[Category:Lists of Shikinaisha by location]] == Shikinai Shrines (式内社) == In the Engishiki, a list of Shinto shrines is given to large shrines.7座7社（うちMyojin Taisha社6座6社）・小社17座17社の計24座24社を記載。 {{List of Shikinaisha/Legend}} {| class="wikitable" style="background:#ffffff; font-size:85%" ! revision.text:
[[Category:Shikinaisha top]][[Category:Shikinaisha top]]This is a '''List of Shikinaisha in Iki Island'''. Or the list of shrines in [[Iki Island]] which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳|12=draft}}. On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha|12=draft|12=draft}} of [[Iki Island]] which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳|12=draft}}. We will cover them in a separate list to avoid confusion.[[Category:edited lists]] [[Category:Lists of Shikinaisha by location]] == Shikinai Shrines (式内社) == In the Engishiki, a list of Shinto shrines is given to large shrines.7座7社（うちMyojin Taisha社6座6社）・小社17座17社の計24座24社を記載。 {{List of Shikinaisha/Legend}} {| class="wikitable" style="background:#ffffff; font-size:85%" ! [[Category:Shikinaisha top]][[Category:Shikinaisha top]]This is a '''List of Shikinaisha in Iki Island'''. Or the list of shrines in [[Iki Island]] which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳}}. On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha}} of [[Iki Island]] which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳}}. We will cover them in a separate list to avoid confusion.[[Category:edited lists]] [[Category:Lists of Shikinaisha by location]] == Shikinai Shrines (式内社) == In the Engishiki, a list of Shinto shrines is given to large shrines.7座7社（うちMyojin Taisha社6座6社）・小社17座17社の計24座24社を記載。 {{List of Shikinaisha/Legend}} {| class="wikitable" style="background:#ffffff; font-size:85%" ! [[Category:Shikinaisha top]][[Category:Shikinaisha top]]This is a '''List of Shikinaisha in Iki Island'''. Or the list of shrines in [[Iki Island]] which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳}}. On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha}} of [[Iki Island]] which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳}}. We will cover them in a separate list to avoid confusion.[[Category:edited lists]] [[Category:Lists of Shikinaisha by location]] == Shikinai Shrines (式内社) == In the Engishiki, a list of Shinto shrines is given to large shrines.7座7社（うちMyojin Taisha社6座6社）・小社17座17社の計24座24社を記載。 {{List of Shikinaisha/Legend}} {| class="wikitable" style="background:#ffffff; font-size:85%" ! revision.text:
[[Category:Shikinaisha top]][[Category:Shikinaisha top]]This is a '''List of Shikinaisha in Iki Island'''. Or the list of shrines in [[Iki Island]] which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳}}. On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha}} of [[Iki Island]] which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳}}. We will cover them in a separate list to avoid confusion.[[Category:edited lists]] [[Category:Lists of Shikinaisha by location]] == Shikinai Shrines (式内社) == In the Engishiki, a list of Shinto shrines is given to large shrines.7座7社（うちMyojin Taisha社6座6社）・小社17座17社の計24座24社を記載。 {{List of Shikinaisha/Legend}} {| class="wikitable" style="background:#ffffff; font-size:85%" ! style="background:#a0f0a0" colspan=4 | {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho}} ! [[Category:Shikinaisha top]][[Category:Shikinaisha top]]This is a '''List of Shikinaisha in Iki Island'''. Or the list of shrines in [[Iki Island]] which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳}}. On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha}} of [[Iki Island]] which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳}}. We will cover them in a separate list to avoid confusion.[[Category:edited lists]] [[Category:Lists of Shikinaisha by location]] == Shikinai Shrines (式内社) == In the Engishiki, a list of Shinto shrines is given to large shrines.7座7社（うちMyojin Taisha社6座6社）・小社17座17社の計24座24社を記載。 {{List of Shikinaisha/Legend}} {| class="wikitable" style="background:#ffffff; font-size:85%" ! revision.text:
This is a '''List of Shikinaisha in Iki Island'''. Or the list of shrines in [[Iki Island]] which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳|12=draft}}. On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha|12=draft}} of [[Iki Island]] which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳|12=draft}}. We will cover them in a separate list to avoid confusion. == Shikinai Shrines (式内社) == In the Engishiki, a list of Shinto shrines is given to large shrines.7座7社（うちMyojin Taisha社6座6社）・小社17座17社の計24座24社を記載。 {{List of Shikinaisha/Legend}} {| class="wikitable" style="background:#ffffff; font-size:85%" ! revision.text:
This is a '''List of Shikinaisha in Iki Island'''. Or the list of shrines in [[Iki Island]] which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳|12=draft}}. On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha|12=draft}} of [[Iki Island]] which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳|12=draft}}. We will cover them in a separate list to avoid confusion. == Shikinai Shrines (式内社) == In the Engishiki, a list of Shinto shrines is given to large shrines.7座7社（うちMyojin Taisha社6座6社）・小社17座17社の計24座24社を記載。 {{List of Shikinaisha/Legend}} {| class="wikitable" style="background:#ffffff; font-size:85%" ! style="background:#a0f0a0" colspan=4 | {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|12=draft}} ! revision.text:
This is a '''List of Shikinaisha in Iki Island'''. Or the list of shrines in [[Iki Island]] which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳|12=draft}}. On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha|12=draft}} of [[Iki Island]] which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳|12=draft}}. We will cover them in a separate list to avoid confusion. == Shikinai Shrines (式内社) == In the Engishiki, a list of Shinto shrines is given to large shrines.7座7社（うちMyojin Taisha社6座6社）・小社17座17社の計24座24社を記載。 {{List of Shikinaisha/Legend}} {| class="wikitable" style="background:#ffffff; font-size:85%" ! revision.text:
This is a '''List of Shikinaisha in Iki Island'''. Or the list of shrines in [[Iki Island]] which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳|12=draft}}. On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha|12=draft}} of [[Iki Island]] which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳|12=draft}}. We will cover them in a separate list to avoid confusion. == Shikinai Shrines (式内社) == In the Engishiki, a list of Shinto shrines is given to large shrines.7座7社（うちMyojin Taisha社6座6社）・小社17座17社の計24座24社を記載。 {{List of Shikinaisha/Legend}} {| class="wikitable" style="background:#ffffff; font-size:85%" ! revision.comment: Removing from [[Category:Shikinaisha bottom]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text:
This is a '''List of Shikinaisha in Iki Island'''. Or the list of shrines in [[Iki Island]] which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳|12=draft}}. On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha|12=draft}} of [[Iki Island]] which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳|12=draft}}. We will cover them in a separate list to avoid confusion. == Shikinai Shrines (式内社) == In the Engishiki, a list of Shinto shrines is given to large shrines.7座7社（うちMyojin Taisha社6座6社）・小社17座17社の計24座24社を記載。 {{List of Shikinaisha/Legend}} {| class="wikitable" style="background:#ffffff; font-size:85%" ! revision.text:
This is a '''List of Shikinaisha in Iki Island'''. Or the list of shrines in [[Iki Island]] which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳|12=draft}}. On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha|12=draft}} of [[Iki Island]] which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳|12=draft}}. We will cover them in a separate list to avoid confusion. == Shikinai Shrines (式内社) == In the Engishiki, a list of Shinto shrines is given to large shrines.7座7社（うちMyojin Taisha社6座6社）・小社17座17社の計24座24社を記載。 {{List of Shikinaisha/Legend}} {| class="wikitable" style="background:#ffffff; font-size:85%" ! revision.text:
This is a '''List of Shikinaisha in Iki Island'''. Or the list of shrines in [[Iki Island]] which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft}}. On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha|qq=draft}} of [[Iki Island]] which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft}}. We will cover them in a separate list to avoid confusion. == Shikinai Shrines (式内社) == In the Engishiki, a list of Shinto shrines is given to large shrines.7座7社（うちMyojin Taisha社6座6社）・小社17座17社の計24座24社を記載。 {{List of Shikinaisha/Legend}} {| class="wikitable" style="background:#ffffff; font-size:85%" ! font-size:85%" colspan="8"|[[{{transclude|List of Shikinaisha/Legend}}|凡例を表示]] |} == 式外社 == 『延喜式』神名帳の編纂当時に存在したが、同帳に記載の無い神社。 == References == ===Notelist=== ===Reflist=== {{reflist}} * 皇典講究所・全国神職会校訂[{{NDLDC|1442211/160}} 『延喜式 上巻』]（大岡山書店、昭和4th year ） - 国立国会図書館デジtarukorekushiョn * [{{NDLDC|1273537/37}} 『延喜式 第2』]（日本古典全集刊行会、昭和4th year ） - 国立国会図書館デジtarukorekushiョn == External links == * [http://21coe.kokugakuin.ac.jp/db/jinja/jinjastate67.html 壱岐島 式内社24座] - 國學院大學21世紀COEプroグramu「神道・神社史料集成」 {{citation needed|いきのしまのしきないしやいちらん}} {{citation needed|壱岐島のList of Shikinai Shrines}} {{citation needed|壱岐島のList of Shikinai Shrines}}{{citation needed|壱岐島のList of Shikinai Shrines}}{{citation needed|壱岐島のList of Shikinai Shrines}} {{citation needed|List of Shikinaisha in Iki Island}} {{citation needed|List of Shikinaisha in Iki Island}} {{citation needed|List of Shikinaisha in List of Shikinaisha in Iki Island}} {{citation needed|List of Shikinaisha in List of Shikinaisha in Iki Island}} {{citation needed|List of Shikinaisha in Iki Island}} {{citation needed|壱岐島壱伎郡のList of Shikinai Shrines}} {{citation needed|壱岐島石田郡のList of Shikinai Shrines}} {{citation needed|List of Shikinaisha in Iki Island}} {{List of Shikinai Shrines}} {{translated page|ja|Template:壱岐島壱伎郡の式内社一覧|version=97145696|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:edited lists]] [[Category:Lists of Shikinaisha by location]] [[Category:Pages without meta categories]] [[Category:Fixed imported list of Shikinaisha and templates]] [[Category:erroneous transclusions of Template:壱岐島壱伎郡の式内社一覧]] [[Category:いき いき]] [[Category:erroneous transclusions of Template:壱岐島石田郡の式内社一覧]] [[Category:いき いした]] }} [[sn:List of Shikinaisha in Iki Island]] [[sn:壱岐島壱伎郡のList of Shikinai Shrines]] [[ja:Template:壱岐島壱伎郡の式内社一覧]] [[sn:壱岐島壱伎郡の式内社一覧]] [[sn:壱岐島石田郡のList of Shikinai Shrines]] [[ja:Template:壱岐島石田郡の式内社一覧]] [[sn:壱岐島石田郡の式内社一覧]] [[ja:壱岐島の式内社一覧]] [[sn:壱岐島の式内社一覧]] [[sn:壱岐島のList of Shikinai Shrines]]

revision.text:
This is a '''List of Shikinaisha in Iki Island'''. Or the list of shrines in [[Iki Island]] which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft}}. On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha|qq=draft}} of [[Iki Island]] which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft}}. We will cover them in a separate list to avoid confusion. == Shikinai Shrines (式内社) == In the Engishiki, a list of Shinto shrines is given to large shrines.7座7社（うちMyojin Taisha社6座6社）・小社17座17社の計24座24社を記載。 {{List of Shikinaisha/Legend}} {| class="wikitable" style="background:#ffffff; font-size:85%" ! style="background:#a0f0a0" colspan=4 | {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|qq=draft}} ! revision.text:
This is a '''List of Shikinaisha in Iki Island'''. Or the list of shrines in [[Iki Island]] which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft}}. On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha|qq=draft}} of [[Iki Island]] which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft}}. We will cover them in a separate list to avoid confusion. == Shikinai Shrines (式内社) == In the Engishiki, a list of Shinto shrines is given to large shrines.7座7社（うちMyojin Taisha社6座6社）・小社17座17社の計24座24社を記載。 {{List of Shikinaisha/Legend}} {| class="wikitable" style="background:#ffffff; font-size:85%" ! revision.text:
This is a '''List of Shikinaisha in Iki Island'''. Or the list of shrines in [[Iki Island]] which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft}}. On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha|qq=draft}} of [[Iki Island]] which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft}}. We will cover them in a separate list to avoid confusion. == Shikinai Shrines (式内社) == In the Engishiki, a list of Shinto shrines is given to large shrines.7座7社（うちMyojin Taisha社6座6社）・小社17座17社の計24座24社を記載。 {{List of Shikinaisha/Legend}} {| class="wikitable" style="background:#ffffff; font-size:85%" ! font-size:85%" colspan="8"|[[{{transclude|List of Shikinaisha/Legend}}|凡例を表示]] |} == 式外社 == 『延喜式』神名帳の編纂当時に存在したが、同帳に記載の無い神社。 == References == ===Notelist=== ===Reflist=== {{reflist}} * 皇典講究所・全国神職会校訂[{{NDLDC|1442211/160}} 『延喜式 上巻』]（大岡山書店、昭和4th year ） - 国立国会図書館デジtarukorekushiョn * [{{NDLDC|1273537/37}} 『延喜式 第2』]（日本古典全集刊行会、昭和4th year ） - 国立国会図書館デジtarukorekushiョn == External links == * [http://21coe.kokugakuin.ac.jp/db/jinja/jinjastate67.html 壱岐島 式内社24座] - 國學院大學21世紀COEプroグramu「神道・神社史料集成」 {{citation needed|いきのしまのしきないしやいちらん}} {{citation needed|壱岐島のList of Shikinai Shrines}} {{citation needed|壱岐島のList of Shikinai Shrines}}{{citation needed|壱岐島のList of Shikinai Shrines}}{{citation needed|壱岐島のList of Shikinai Shrines}} {{citation needed|List of Shikinaisha in Iki Island}} {{citation needed|List of Shikinaisha in Iki Island}} {{citation needed|List of Shikinaisha in List of Shikinaisha in Iki Island}} {{citation needed|List of Shikinaisha in List of Shikinaisha in Iki Island}} {{citation needed|List of Shikinaisha in Iki Island}} {{citation needed|壱岐島壱伎郡のList of Shikinai Shrines}} {{citation needed|壱岐島石田郡のList of Shikinai Shrines}} {{citation needed|List of Shikinaisha in Iki Island}} {{List of Shikinai Shrines}} {{translated page|ja|Template:壱岐島壱伎郡の式内社一覧|version=97145696|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Lists of Shikinaisha by location]] [[Category:Pages without meta categories]] [[Category:Fixed imported list of Shikinaisha and templates]] [[Category:erroneous transclusions of Template:壱岐島壱伎郡の式内社一覧]] [[Category:いき いき]] [[Category:erroneous transclusions of Template:壱岐島石田郡の式内社一覧]] [[Category:いき いした]] }} [[sn:List of Shikinaisha in Iki Island]] [[sn:壱岐島壱伎郡のList of Shikinai Shrines]] [[ja:Template:壱岐島壱伎郡の式内社一覧]] [[sn:壱岐島壱伎郡の式内社一覧]] [[sn:壱岐島石田郡のList of Shikinai Shrines]] [[ja:Template:壱岐島石田郡の式内社一覧]] [[sn:壱岐島石田郡の式内社一覧]] [[ja:壱岐島の式内社一覧]] [[sn:壱岐島の式内社一覧]] [[sn:壱岐島のList of Shikinai Shrines]]

revision.comment: Copying from [[Category:Lists of Shikinaisha by location]] to [[Category:qq]][[Category:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:qq]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text:
This is a '''List of Shikinaisha in Iki Island'''. Or the list of shrines in [[Iki Island]] which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft}}. On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha|qq=draft}} of [[Iki Island]] which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft}}. We will cover them in a separate list to avoid confusion. == Shikinai Shrines (式内社) == In the Engishiki, a list of Shinto shrines is given to large shrines.7座7社（うちMyojin Taisha社6座6社）・小社17座17社の計24座24社を記載。 {{List of Shikinaisha/Legend}} {| class="wikitable" style="background:#ffffff; font-size:85%" ! style="background:#a0f0a0" colspan=4 | {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|qq=draft}} ! revision.text:
This is a '''List of Shikinaisha in Iki Island'''. Or the list of shrines in [[Iki Island]] which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft}}. On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha|qq=draft}} of [[Iki Island]] which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft}}. We will cover them in a separate list to avoid confusion. == Shikinai Shrines (式内社) == In the Engishiki, a list of Shinto shrines is given to large shrines.7座7社（うちMyojin Taisha社6座6社）・小社17座17社の計24座24社を記載。 {{List of Shikinaisha/Legend}} {| class="wikitable" style="background:#ffffff; font-size:85%" ! revision.text:
This is a '''List of Shikinaisha in Iki Island'''. Or the list of shrines in [[Iki Island]] which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft}}. On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha|qq=draft}} of [[Iki Island]] which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft}}. We will cover them in a separate list to avoid confusion. == Shikinai Shrines (式内社) == In the Engishiki, a list of Shinto shrines is given to large shrines.7座7社（うちMyojin Taisha社6座6社）・小社17座17社の計24座24社を記載。 {{List of Shikinaisha/Legend}} {| class="wikitable" style="background:#ffffff; font-size:85%" ! style="background:#a0f0a0" colspan=4 | {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|qq=draft}} ! This is a '''List of Shikinaisha in Iki Island'''. Or the list of shrines in [[Iki Island]] which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft}}. On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha|qq=draft}} of [[Iki Island]] which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft}}. We will cover them in a separate list to avoid confusion. == Shikinai Shrines (式内社) == In the Engishiki, a list of Shinto shrines is given to large shrines.7座7社（うちMyojin Taisha社6座6社）・小社17座17社の計24座24社を記載。 {{List of Shikinaisha/Legend}} {| class="wikitable" style="background:#ffffff; font-size:85%" ! revision.text:
This is a '''List of Shikinaisha in Iki Island'''. Or the list of shrines in [[Iki Island]] which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft}}. On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha|qq=draft}} of [[Iki Island]] which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft}}. We will cover them in a separate list to avoid confusion. == Shikinai Shrines (式内社) == In the Engishiki, a list of Shinto shrines is given to large shrines.7座7社（うちMyojin Taisha社6座6社）・小社17座17社の計24座24社を記載。 {{List of Shikinaisha/Legend}} {| class="wikitable" style="background:#ffffff; font-size:85%" ! On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha|qq=draft}} of [[Iki Island]] which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft}}. revision.text:
This is a '''List of Shikinaisha in Iki Island'''. Or the list of shrines in [[Iki Island]] which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft}}. On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha|qq=draft}} of [[Iki Island]] which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft}}. We will cover them in a separate list to avoid confusion. == Shikinai Shrines (式内社) == In the Engishiki, a list of Shinto shrines is given to large shrines.7座7社（うちMyojin Taisha社6座6社）・小社17座17社の計24座24社を記載。 {{List of Shikinaisha/Legend}} {| class="wikitable" style="background:#ffffff; font-size:85%" ! style="background:#a0f0a0" colspan=4 | {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|qq=draft}} ! This is a '''List of Shikinaisha in Iki Island'''. Or the list of shrines in [[Iki Island]] which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft}}. On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha|qq=draft}} of [[Iki Island]] which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft}}. We will cover them in a separate list to avoid confusion. [[ja:壱岐島の式内社一覧]] == Shikinai Shrines (式内社) == In the Engishiki, a list of Shinto shrines is given to large shrines.7座7社（うちMyojin Taisha社6座6社）・小社17座17社の計24座24社を記載。 {{List of Shikinaisha/Legend}} {| class="wikitable" style="background:#ffffff; font-size:85%" ! revision.text:
This is a '''List of Shikinaisha in Iki Island'''. Or the list of shrines in [[Iki Island]] which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft}}. On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha|qq=draft}} of [[Iki Island]] which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft}}. We will cover them in a separate list to avoid confusion. [[ja:壱岐島の式内社一覧]] == Shikinai Shrines (式内社) == In the Engishiki, a list of Shinto shrines is given to large shrines.7座7社（うちMyojin Taisha社6座6社）・小社17座17社の計24座24社を記載。 {{List of Shikinaisha/Legend}} {| class="wikitable" style="background:#ffffff; font-size:85%" ! style="background:#a0f0a0" colspan=4 | {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|qq=draft}} ! revision.text:
This is a '''List of Shikinaisha in Iki Island'''. Or the list of shrines in [[Iki Island]] which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft}}. On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha|qq=draft}} of [[Iki Island]] which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft}}. We will cover them in a separate list to avoid confusion. [[ja:壱岐島の式内社一覧]] == Shikinai Shrines (式内社) == In the Engishiki, a list of Shinto shrines is given to large shrines.7座7社（うちMyojin Taisha社6座6社）・小社17座17社の計24座24社を記載。 {{List of Shikinaisha/Legend}} {| class="wikitable" style="background:#ffffff; font-size:85%" ! revision.text:
This is a '''List of Shikinaisha in Iki Island'''. Or the list of shrines in [[Iki Island]] which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft}}. On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha|qq=draft}} of [[Iki Island]] which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft}}. We will cover them in a separate list to avoid confusion. [[ja:壱岐島の式内社一覧]] == Shikinai Shrines (式内社) == In the Engishiki, a list of Shinto shrines is given to large shrines.7座7社（うちMyojin Taisha社6座6社）・小社17座17社の計24座24社を記載。 {{List of Shikinaisha/Legend}} {| class="wikitable" style="background:#ffffff; font-size:85%" ! revision.comment: /* Shikinai Shrines (式内社) */
revision.text:
This is a '''List of Shikinaisha in Iki Island'''. Or the list of shrines in [[Iki Island]] which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft}}. On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha|qq=draft}} of [[Iki Island]] which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft}}. We will cover them in a separate list to avoid confusion. [[ja:壱岐島の式内社一覧]] == Shikinai Shrines (式内社) == In the Engishiki, 7 designated shrines (including 6 Myōjin Taisha) and 17 minor shrines are recorded, for a total of 24 shrine listings. {{List of revision.comment: /* 式外社 */
revision.text:
This is a '''List of Shikinaisha in Iki Island'''. Or the list of shrines in [[Iki Island]] which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft}}. On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha|qq=draft}} of [[Iki Island]] which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft}}. We will cover them in a separate list to avoid confusion. [[ja:壱岐島の式内社一覧]] == Shikinai Shrines (式内社) == In the Engishiki, 7 designated shrines (including 6 Myōjin Taisha) and 17 minor shrines are recorded, for a total of 24 shrine listings. {{List of Shikinaisha/Legend}} {| class="wikitable" style="background:#ffffff; font-size:85%" ! style="background:#a0f0a0" colspan=4 | {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳}} ! revision.comment: /* Shikinai Shrines (式内社) */
revision.text:
This is a '''List of Shikinaisha in Iki Island'''. Or the list of shrines in [[Iki Island]] which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft}}. On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha|qq=draft}} of [[Iki Island]] which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft}}. We will cover them in a separate list to avoid confusion. [[ja:壱岐島の式内社一覧]] == Shikinai Shrines (式内社) == In the Engishiki, 7 designated shrines (including 6 Myōjin Taisha) and 17 minor shrines are recorded, for a total of 24 shrine listings. {{List of revision.text:
This is a '''List of Shikinaisha in Iki Island'''. Or the list of shrines in [[Iki Island]] which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}. On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|qq=}} of [[Iki Island]] which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}. We will cover them in a separate list to avoid confusion. [[ja:壱岐島の式内社一覧]] == Shikinai Shrines (式内社) == In the Engishiki, 7 designated shrines (including 6 Myōjin Taisha) and 17 minor shrines are recorded, for a total of 24 shrine listings. {{List of Shikinaisha/Legend}} {| class="wikitable" style="background:#ffffff; font-size:85%" ! style="background:#a0f0a0" colspan=4 | {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki revision.comment: Text replacement - "Shikinai Shrines" to "Shikinaisha"
revision.text:
This is a '''List of Shikinaisha in Iki Island'''. Or the list of shrines in [[Iki Island]] which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}. On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|qq=}} of [[Iki Island]] which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}. We will cover them in a separate list to avoid confusion. [[ja:壱岐島の式内社一覧]] == Shikinaisha (式内社) == In the Engishiki, 7 designated shrines (including 6 Myōjin Taisha) and 17 minor shrines are recorded, for a total of 24 shrine listings. {{List of Shikinaisha/Legend}} {| class="wikitable" style="background:#ffffff; font-size:85%" ! style="background:#a0f0a0" colspan=4 | {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki
